title: nigella arvensis subsp. divaricata
intro: Nigella arvensis subsp. divaricata, also known as wild fennel, is a subspecies of Nigella arvensis, a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nigella arvensis subsp. divaricata include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Nigella arvensis subsp. divaricata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the seeds or flowers in hot water.
